_description: Dark typographic card. Each slide needs a 'heading'. All other fields are optional and have defaults. Use 'accent' and 'bg' to give each slide its own color personality.

_slots.heading: REQUIRED — main large heading text (1–6 words work best)
_slots.body: optional — supporting paragraph shown below the heading
_slots.label: optional — small uppercase tag shown above the heading (e.g. 'Chapter 01')
_slots.image: optional — path to a local image file (relative to data JSON) or an https:// URL. Shown as a full-width photo block.
_slots.imagePosition: optional — where to place the image: 'top' (above heading, capped at 760px), 'middle' (rounded inset between heading and body, capped at 640px), or 'bottom' (fills remaining lower space). Images always use object-fit:contain — they are never cropped. Default: bottom.
_slots.footer: optional — small text anchored to the bottom-left corner

title: Design Principles

slides.label: Chapter 01
slides.heading: Less is more
slides.body: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication. Remove everything that does not serve the message.

slides.label: Chapter 02
slides.heading: White space breathes
slides.body: Empty space is not wasted space. It gives the eye room to rest and the mind room to think.

slides.label: Chapter 03
slides.heading: Type is voice
slides.body: Your choice of typeface communicates before anyone reads a word.
